browserQa.summary: Existing homepage and booking QA evidence remains intact. Final local Song Wars QA passed at 390, 430, 768, 1366, and 1440 widths with no clipping, stretching, horizontal overflow, console errors, page errors, or failed requests. The responsive WebP poster remained fully visible in the initial viewport at every size, all 14 scroll reveals completed, reduced motion disabled nonessential animation, all three Discord CTAs used the centralized invite, and all seven Instagram links resolved. Three-run Lighthouse medians were 99/100/100/100 mobile and 100/100/100/100 desktop; mobile retained the sharper high-DPI poster rather than lowering source density for one synthetic performance point.

authenticatedSweep.summary: Secure local hidden prompt supplied admin passcode only in subprocess memory. E2E_TEST_MODE=true prod full sweep authenticated through canonical login/JWT auth and passed admin QA, knowledge, docs templates, schema migration, terminal smoke, and safe fixture checks.
